title: Deendayal Port Authority Senior Marine Engineer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: Deendayal Port Authority Senior Marine Engineer Notification 2026 has been released on 04 May 2026 on the official website of Deendayal Port Authority. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the DPA Senior Marine Engineer Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Marine Engineer/AGM/Chief Engineer (Marine) with 3 years' regular service in pay scale of Rs. 70000-200000
qualification.details: Marine Engineer/AGM/Chief Engineer (Marine) with 3 years' regular service in pay scale of Rs. 70000-200000

selection_process: Promotion through composite method DPC at Port level Merit based on ACRs (benchmark Very Good)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Deendayal Port Authority to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
